ai_summary: Here's an executive summary of the document:  AKI India Limited announced substantial board changes, appointing three new Independent Directors and one Non-Independent Director, while an existing Independent Director resigned, resulting in a net increase of two Independent Directors and reconstitution of key committees (Audit, NRC). A significant point of scrutiny is the appointment of Ms. Naba Fatima as a Non-Independent Director, given her familial relationship to the Managing Director and another board member, which warrants monitoring regarding potential influence and overall board independence.
